generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure within a Living Lab environment, serving as the physical counterpart for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations."
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingControlActuator, HVACSystemActuator, OtherAutomatedDevicesActuator, RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectsManagementService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, BIMModel, BCSRuntimeData, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, Revit, MDEFramework, CurrentTemperatureInsight, CurrentHumidityInsight, CurrentLightInsight, CurrentOccupancyInsight, EnergyUsageForecast, OccupancyPatterns, EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, NonVisualHealthInsight, BuildingVisualizationInsight
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with Building Control System (BCS) runtime data, providing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics for semantic integration and automated transformation into runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework, Revit
]

instance BCSRuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Building Control System runtime data used to enrich BIM models for semantic integration and automated transformation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring humidity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring light intensity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor detecting occupancy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity readings from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity readings from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy counts from environmental sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentTemperatureInsight, CurrentHumidityInsight, CurrentLightInsight, CurrentOccupancyInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy usage and occupancy patterns"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsageForecast, OccupancyPatterns
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy usage based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting for visual comfort optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of non-visual health effects through environmental adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations using Unreal Engine"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingVisualizationInsight
]

instance CurrentTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings for monitoring purposes"
]

instance CurrentHumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity readings for monitoring purposes"
]

instance CurrentLightInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time light intensity readings for monitoring purposes"
]

instance CurrentOccupancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy counts for monitoring purposes"
]

instance EnergyUsageForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted energy consumption for future periods"
]

instance OccupancyPatterns : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted occupancy trends for maintenance planning"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for energy-saving measures based on analysis"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal lighting settings for visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for environmental conditions to support non-visual health effects"
]

instance BuildingVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building data for operational oversight"
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated building performance outcomes for analysis"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT/AMQP protocol handling for real-time sensor data transmission and bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectsManagementService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin management middleware for bidirectional communication with BCS actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthEffectsManagementService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization platform for interactive building simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool for creating and managing geometric and spatial models"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModel
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven Engineering framework for automated BIM-to-runtime artifact transformation with continuous evolution through service extensions and real-time data integration, following Design Science Research methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMModel, BCSRuntimeData
]

instance LightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting systems in the building"
]

instance HVACSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC systems"
]

instance OtherAutomatedDevicesActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Other automated devices managed via BCS for building operations"
]

instance ModularArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with service-oriented components allowing for scalable deployment"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimized control commands (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting adjustments) generated by DT services and sent to physical actuators via Eclipse Ditto for real-time adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with data updates processed continuously; however, exact time intervals (e.g., milliseconds) are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integrated ecosystem comprising BIM models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular service extensions, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle stages from design through construction to operation and refurbishment, with emphasis on operational phase for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness; verification and validation details beyond ODTE are not provided."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connection via MQTT, AMQP, and HTTP protocols through Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange between physical assets and digital twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems such as IoT platforms and Building Management Systems (BMS) via standardized APIs and middleware (e.g., Hono/Ditto) for cross-system data exchange."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), MQTT/AMQP protocols via Eclipse Hono, and Ditto's Thing Model specifications; specific industry standards like ISO or IEC are not explicitly cited."
]
